ddls:
CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the metric (e.g., Total Wells, Active Producers) */,
  "last_year_value" INTEGER /* Value of the metric in the last year */,
  "current_year_value" INTEGER /* Value of the metric in the current year */,
  "yoy_trend" TEXT /* Year-over-year trend (e.g., Up, Down) */,
  "yoy_percent_change" REAL /* Percentage change from the last year */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region associated with the metric */,
  "producer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the producer associated with the metric */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_producer_id FOREIGN KEY ("producer_id") REFERENCES producers ("producer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wells" (
  "well_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each well */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the well */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the well (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the well started production */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the well stopped production */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region where the well is located */,
  "producer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the producer operating the well */,
  "well_type" TEXT /* Type of well (e.g., oil, gas, injection) */,
  "api_number" TEXT /* API number of the well */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("well_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wells_producer_id FOREIGN KEY ("producer_id") REFERENCES producers ("producer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wells_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "producers" (
  "producer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each producer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the producer */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the producer started operations */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the producer ceased operations */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region where the producer operates */,
  "company_type" TEXT /* Type of company (e.g., public, private, joint venture) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("producer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_producers_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permits" (
  "permit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permit */,
  "well_id" INTEGER /* ID of the well associated with the permit */,
  "issue_date" TEXT /* Date when the permit was issued */,
  "expiry_date" TEXT /* Date when the permit expires */,
  "permit_type" TEXT /* Type of permit (e.g., drilling, production) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permits_well_id FOREIGN KEY ("well_id") REFERENCES wells ("well_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the region is located */,
  "manager" TEXT /* Manager responsible for the region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "production" (
  "production_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each production record */,
  "well_id" INTEGER /* ID of the well where the production occurred */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of production */,
  "volume" REAL /* Volume of oil or gas produced */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the volume (e.g., barrels, cubic meters) */,
  "product_type" TEXT /* Type of product (e.g., crude oil, natural gas liquids) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("production_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_production_well_id FOREIGN KEY ("well_id") REFERENCES wells ("well_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forecasting" (
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forecast */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region for which the forecast is made */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the forecast */,
  "predicted_volume" REAL /* Predicted volume of oil or gas */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the predicted volume */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the forecast (e.g., 0-1) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forecast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forecasting_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, manager, admin) */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region the user is responsible for */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the platform was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view report, download data) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role and its permissions */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Detailed list of permissions for the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "drilling_activities" (
  "drilling_activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each drilling activity */,
  "well_id" INTEGER /* ID of the well where the activity occurred */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., drilling, completion) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("drilling_activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_drilling_activities_well_id FOREIGN KEY ("well_id") REFERENCES wells ("well_id")
)
